description_long: This is a tall, rectangular office building with a sleek, modern facade dominated by a grid of dark blue-tinted glass windows. The structure features a flat roof with visible rooftop equipment and a light-colored parapet running along the top edge. The windows are arranged in a highly regular, uniform pattern, giving the building a clean and professional appearance. The base of the building includes a recessed section with a series of dark columns or supports, suggesting a lobby or entryway area. No prominent signage is visible on the exterior, and the overall design is minimalist, emphasizing straight lines and geometric precision. The building's style and materials are consistent with contemporary urban office towers found in major city centers.
description: A tall, modern office building with a grid of dark blue glass windows and a flat roof, featuring a minimalist, geometric design and a recessed base.
description_view_0: The facade shows a uniform grid of windows with a recessed base and visible rooftop details.
description_view_1: This side reveals the building's depth, a flat roof with rooftop equipment, and a less prominent recessed base.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side displays the regular window grid and a slightly different arrangement of rooftop features.
description_view_3: This view highlights the building's side with a visible recessed base and rooftop structures, emphasizing the building's rectangular form.
attribute_window_pattern: Uniform grid of rectangular windows, evenly spaced in a regular, repeating pattern across all facades.
